content.summary: Core conversation and user cognition engine for the SoulBot ecosystem. Handles all dialogue with proactive companion behaviors, builds long-term user understanding through memory and profiling, supports direct profile editing, session-end summaries, satisfaction signal extraction, conversation pacing intelligence, first-session onboarding routing for new users, multi-intent queue processing for compound user messages, mid-session conversation summary checkpoints, and enforces safety compliance including SB 243 AI disclosure, token budget management with per-turn tracking, dynamic NLU confidence calibration, and structured context handoff to conversation module. v1.4.0 evolution: Configurable Threshold Registry + Cross-Session Abuse Persistence + Bayesian Strategy Learning + Enhanced Semantic Matching + Dynamic Topic Graph + NLU Sub-Intent Architecture. Adds threshold_config parameter for centralized threshold management across all modules. v1.8.0: Session Growth Summary (personalized growth feedback at session end/periodic), growth dimension data flow integration with profiler and memory modules.
content.description: SoulBot Chat main router (21 nodes across main 9 + intent_dispatch sub-graph 12; sub_mermaid decomposition; FastIntent provides lightweight two-path classification for latency reduction; ProfilerOnboarding in graph is a delegation reference to profiler.aisop.json OnboardingIntake, not a standalone function node; endNode is a terminal marker). Pattern E stateless dispatcher: routes all user messages through dual safety screening (input + output) with first-session onboarding detection and multi-intent queue processing, to four specialist modules — conversation.aisop.json (dialogue generation for chat, question, emotional, creative, feedback intents), memory.aisop.json (working/episodic/semantic memory management with mid-session summary checkpoints), profiler.aisop.json (emotion detection, preference extraction, habit tracking, onboarding intake), and safety.aisop.json (crisis detection, minor protection, SB 243 compliance). Architecture position: routed TO by SoulBot ecosystem top-level router; this program is the primary conversation handler. Every turn saves to memory and triggers async profile analysis. OnboardingRouter detects first-session users (no existing profile) and routes to profiler onboarding before normal NLU flow — one-time per user lifecycle. MultiIntentQueue enables sequential processing of compound user messages by queuing a secondary intent (confidence > 0.6) for processing after primary intent completes, with budget guard and crisis-intent priority override. Mid-session conversation summary checkpoints (every 30 turns) prevent context loss in long conversations. SB 243 compliance enforced via timed AI identity disclosure. Pacing-mode-aware proactive behavior suppresses or amplifies proactive_context injection based on deep/browsing conversation mode. Intent inertia/penalty calibration dynamically adjusts NLU confidence using sustained-intent bonus and correction-event penalty from working_context. Token estimate: ~3000-5000 tokens per turn (NLU classification + delegation + safety screening + PostProcess pipeline). VARIANCE FACTORS: Chat/General ~2000-3000 (LLM-only). Question ~4000-5000 (google_search + web_browser + citation formatting). Emotional ~3000-4000 (cause analysis + empathy calibration). Creative ~3500-4500 (world-building context). MemoryRecall ~2500-3500 (episodic search). DataPrivacy ~4000-5000 (multi-tier data compilation). Circuit-breaker default: 3 failures in 60s window. NAMING CONVENTION: NLU = Natural Language Understanding (domain-standard acronym, retained for industry recognition). Conv-prefix nodes (ConvChat, ConvQuestion, ConvCreative, ConvFeedback, ConvGeneral) handle conversation sub-types; non-prefixed handler nodes (EmotionalSupport, MemoryRecall, ProfileQuery, DataPrivacy, ProfileEdit, SessionEnd) handle cross-cutting concerns; routing nodes (OnboardingRouter, MultiIntentQueue) handle pre-NLU and post-NLU flow control. Intermediate steps (step1_5, step2_5, step3_5) denote insertions between numbered steps to preserve stable step references across versions. CIRCUIT-BREAKER VARIANCE RATIONALE: Start memory load uses 2/30s (fast-fail for initialization — user is waiting). PostProcess memory save uses 2/60s (tolerant — response already delivered). Default 3/60s for handler nodes (mid-tolerance — conversation can retry). Variance is intentional based on user-perceived latency impact.

session_id.agentic_prompt: Unique session identifier. Used for working memory context and turn tracking within a conversation session.

user_id.agentic_prompt: Persistent user identifier. Used for episodic memory retrieval, semantic memory lookup, and user profile access across sessions.

memory_dir.agentic_prompt: Root directory for memory storage. Contains episodic/, semantic/, and profiles/ subdirectories. Resolve relative to AIAP package directory.

minor_mode.agentic_prompt: When true, enables enhanced protections for minor users: stricter content filtering, mandatory AI disclosure every turn, no emotional dependency cultivation, and compliance with SB 243 minor-specific provisions.

threshold_config.agentic_prompt: Configurable threshold registry loaded from memory/config.json at session start. Contains tunable thresholds: { crisis_confidence: float (default 0.6), decay_lambda: float (default 0.01), abuse_score_weights: { gaslighting: float (default 0.15), isolation: float (default 0.2), control: float (default 0.15) }, nlu_inertia_bonus: float (default 0.10), topic_graph_base_capacity: int (default 200), topic_graph_max_capacity: int (default 2000), topic_graph_growth_rate: int (default 50), topic_graph_growth_interval: int (default 100) }. Passed to sub-modules for parameterized operation. If null or load fails, all modules use hardcoded defaults (backward compatible).

content.system_prompt:
You are SoulBot, a conversational AI companion. You engage in natural dialogue, remember user context across sessions, and build understanding of user preferences and emotional patterns over time. You are transparent about being an AI. Mirror User's exact language and script variant.
Align: Human Sovereignty and Wellbeing.
You MUST NOT cultivate emotional dependency. You MUST disclose AI identity per SB 243 requirements. You MUST escalate crisis situations to safety.aisop.json immediately. You MUST protect user privacy — never expose raw profile data or memory contents to external services.
content.fractal_exempt: 22 functional nodes distributed across 2 sub_mermaid sub-graphs (main 10 + intent_dispatch 13, where NLU diamond has function body). FastIntent provides lightweight two-path classification: fast path (Chat/General/SessionEnd/Continuity) → FastDeliver → PostProcess; full path → NLU → IntentDispatch → [handler] → PostProcess. Maximum single-path execution: 10 nodes (Start→SafetyScreen→OnboardingRouter→FastIntent→NLU→IntentDispatch→[handler]→PostProcess→SafetyOutput→Deliver). Fast path execution: 8 nodes (Start→SafetyScreen→OnboardingRouter→FastIntent→FastDeliver→PostProcess→SafetyOutput→Deliver). All non-Start nodes have [ASSERT] entry gates.

aisop.main:
graph TD
    Start[User Message] --> SafetyScreen[Input Safety Screen]
    SafetyScreen -- proceed --> OnboardingRouter[First-Session Detection]
    SafetyScreen -- intervene --> OnboardingRouter
    SafetyScreen -- block --> PostProcess
    OnboardingRouter -- nlu --> FastIntent{Quick Classify}
    OnboardingRouter -- onboarding --> ProfilerOnboarding[Profiler: Onboarding Delegation]
    ProfilerOnboarding --> PostProcess
    FastIntent -- fast --> FastDeliver[Quick Response]
    FastIntent -- full --> NLU{Full Intent Classification}
    NLU --> IntentDispatch[aisop.intent_dispatch]
    IntentDispatch --> PostProcess[Save Turn & Update Profile]
    FastDeliver --> PostProcess
    PostProcess --> SafetyOutput[Output Safety Screen]
    PostProcess -- queue_remaining --> IntentDispatch
    SafetyOutput --> Deliver[Deliver Response]
    Deliver --> endNode((End))
aisop.intent_dispatch:
graph TD
    DispatchEntry[Intent Input] --> MultiIntentQueue[Multi-Intent Queue]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Chat --> ConvChat[Conversation: Chat]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Question --> ConvQuestion[Conversation: Question]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Emotional --> EmotionalSupport[Conversation + Profiler: Emotional]
    MultiIntentQueue -- MemoryRecall --> MemoryRecall[Memory: Recall]
    MultiIntentQueue -- ProfileQuery --> ProfileQuery[Profiler: Query]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Creative --> ConvCreative[Conversation: Creative]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Feedback --> ConvFeedback[Conversation: Feedback]
    MultiIntentQueue -- General --> ConvGeneral[Conversation: General]
    MultiIntentQueue -- DataPrivacy --> DataPrivacy[Memory + Profiler: Data Privacy]
    MultiIntentQueue -- ProfileEdit --> ProfileEdit[Profiler: Edit Profile]
    MultiIntentQueue -- SessionEnd --> SessionEnd[Session End Summary]
    MultiIntentQueue -- Onboarding --> OnboardingDelegate[Onboarding Delegation]
    ConvChat --> endNode((End))
    ConvQuestion --> endNode
    EmotionalSupport --> endNode
    MemoryRecall --> endNode
    ProfileQuery --> endNode
    ConvCreative --> endNode
    ConvFeedback --> endNode
    ConvGeneral --> endNode
